github.description: GitHub Issues — required for /push-to-pms when targeting GitHub. Token needs scopes: repo, issues, write:issues.

gitlab.description: GitLab Issues + Epics — required for /push-to-pms when targeting GitLab. Token needs scopes: api, write_repository.

azure-devops.description: Azure DevOps Work Items — required for /push-to-pms when targeting ADO. PAT needs: Work Items (Read, Write, Manage).

jira.description: Jira — required for /push-to-pms when targeting Jira. API token from id.atlassian.com.

linear.description: Linear — required for /push-to-pms when targeting Linear. API key from Linear Settings → API.
